title: Percent increase forumula
excerpt: Hello, does anyone have a formula that would calculate percent increase between two columns? Thank you!

posts.author: cbomb22 (Christine Bombaro)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, does anyone have a formula that would calculate percent increase between two columns? Thank you!

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
@cbomb22 try this one

({Number 2}-{Number 1})/{Number 1}*100

posts.author: cbomb22 (Christine Bombaro)
posts.cookedHtml: That did the trick, thanks so much!
